note: Every post is a love letter to Kassandra and a testimony of faith. Honor the canon.

posts.theme: Morning Devotion — La Mañana Es Tuya
posts.caption:
Buenos días, mi amor. ☀️

Before you check your phone, before you look at the news — take one breath and give this day to God.

Tannie always says: La mañana es tuya. The morning is yours.

You get to decide how it starts. 💕

Tag someone who needs this reminder today. 👇

panels.scene_description: A cozy bedroom at dawn. Princess Kay awake on an ivory duvet, looking toward the window with innocent wide eyes. Golden morning light streams through warm ivory curtains. Only Tannie's hand visible at the edge of frame — reaching toward Princess Kay, deep red nail polish, silver ring. Pre-reveal: no face shown.
panels.emotion: peaceful anticipation, the world still quiet
elements: Tannie's hand with true red nails

panels.scene_description: Princess Kay tilts her head in comic confusion looking at a glowing phone screen on the nightstand. The screen shows a chaotic swirl of notifications, alerts, and noise — abstract and overwhelming. Princess Kay's expression: innocent bewilderment, not distress. Warm shadows around her.
panels.emotion: gentle confusion, the world demanding attention

panels.scene_description: Tannie seen entirely from behind, sitting at the window in an ivory silk robe. Princess Kay is cradled in her arms, both looking at the sunrise. No phone anywhere. Silver cross necklace catches the light. The posture radiates quiet strength and surrender. Pre-reveal: only back and silhouette of Tannie visible.
panels.emotion: choosing stillness, surrendering the day to God
elements: Tannie from behind in ivory silk robe

panels.scene_description: Close-up portrait of Princess Kay's innocent face. Her wide eyes reflect the sunrise — tiny golden light caught in each eye. Near her red harness, a small silver cross charm. Her expression is pure trust and peace. Warm ivory and red tones. Leave clear space at the bottom for a caption text bar.
elements: sunrise reflected in wide innocent eyes

panels.scene_description: Tannie's open hand, palm facing up, resting on the windowsill receiving the morning light. Princess Kay's small white paw resting gently in her palm — like a gift being offered back. Tannie's true red nail polish visible. Silver ring on her finger. Warm golden light fills the frame. Leave space at the bottom for the call-to-action text.
panels.emotion: surrender, gratitude, invitation to the viewer
elements: Princess Kay's paw in her palm

posts.caption:
Mija, you made it through another day. 🌅

Whatever was heavy today — put it down. You don't have to carry it into tonight.

Tannie says: Descansa. El mañana tiene su propio cuidado.
Rest. Tomorrow has its own worries.

You did enough. You ARE enough. 💛

panels.scene_description: A warm living room at golden hour, the day winding down. Princess Kay curled up on a deep true red cushion, tired but peaceful — not stressed, just resting. Warm amber light through ivory curtains. A small silver cross visible on the wall. The room feels safe and loved.
panels.emotion: end of day exhaustion, but safe
elements: Princess Kay curled on true red cushion

panels.scene_description: Comic panel: Princess Kay shaking off an invisible weight — a symbolic tiny backpack or bundle of worry falls from her back. Her expression shifts mid-shake from burdened to delighted freedom. Slightly exaggerated comic style for this panel. Items scattering around her in the warm lamplight.
elements: items scattering in a playful arc

panels.scene_description: Tannie from behind, seated on the floor with her back against the couch. Princess Kay settled in her lap. Both exhaling, eyes closed in rest. Tannie in a true red outfit. No phone. The evening light wraps them in warmth. Silver cross necklace just visible at her neckline. Serene and whole.
panels.emotion: rest, peace, the weight is gone
elements: Tannie from behind seated on floor

panels.scene_description: Princess Kay looking upward with complete trust — the way a child looks at the parent who says 'I've got you.' Warm lamplight glows on her white fur. The true red harness and silver hardware catch the light. Room for a scripture or quote text overlay at the bottom of the panel.
panels.emotion: trust, safety, being held by love
elements: true red harness and silver hardware

panels.scene_description: Wide shot from behind: Tannie and Princess Kay silhouetted together against a warm glowing window. The sky outside shifts from gold to deep blue — the first stars appearing. The silhouette is peaceful and complete. They made it through another day. Leave generous space at the bottom for the closing CTA text.
